data.title: SC seems doubtful about Falun Gong's lawsuit against Cisco. Verdict may impact cases holding companies responsible for human rights violations globally.
data.description: The ruling from the court might have significant consequences for legal cases aimed at holding corporations accountable for global human rights violations.

data.title: KTS Energy Hits a Home Run with Retail Stand at Great American Ball Park
data.description: On April 28, 2026, in Cincinnati, Ohio, KTS Energy, a prominent marketing company in the United States, revealed its plans to participate in an event at Great American Ball Park. The initiative will center on promoting sustainability and environmentally friendly practices within the community. This move is part of KTS Energy's commitment to engaging with the public on important issues.

data.title: J. Cleo Thompson Family Office, Led by Christy Thompson, Announces Strategic Expansion of Oil & Gas Portfolio; Partners with Bank of America Private Bank for Mineral Management Services
data.description: On April 28, 2026, in Dallas, the J. Cleo Thompson Family Office, under the leadership of Principal Christy Thompson, disclosed a substantial increase in its investments within the oil and gas industry. This move aims to bolster its expanding energy portfolio through strategic diversification.

data.title: Delta Dental renews partnership with Disabled American Veterans, commits $150,000 in support of its mission
data.description: Erlanger, Kentucky - DAV (Disabled American Veterans) confirmed their continued partnership with Delta Dental, the country's top dental benefits provider, on April 28, 2026. Delta Dental has contributed $150,000 to support DAV's mission. This partnership aims to enhance access to dental care for veterans in need.

data.title: EMGS: Asset sale transaction completed
data.description: Electromagnetic Geoservices ASA released a stock exchange announcement on March 31, 2026, revealing a binding agreement with P-2 Riggs Capital, Inc. The agreement, later transferred to Riggs Holdco AS, involves the acquisition of the EM Business. This transaction will include the transfer of the Company's business operations, assets (such as hardware and intellectual property rights), contractual positions, and all employees to the buyer. The deal signifies a significant move in the business world with an undisclosed financial value.
ENI HAS INKED AN AGREEMENT WITH VENEZUELA'S OIL MINISTRY AND PDVSA TO RESUME OPERATIONS AT THE JUNIN 5 OIL PROJECT, THE COMPANY ANNOUNCES.

data.title: Interconnected Threats Expose the Limits of Siloed Risk Management, Finds Info-Tech Research Group
data.description: The interconnected risks faced by businesses globally are being amplified by rapid technological advancements and increased volatility. Recent findings from Info-Tech Research Group reveal that traditional methods of enterprise risk management are not adequately equipped to address these challenges, as they lack the necessary integration for effective visibility and control.
GUYANA'S OIL OUTPUT AVERAGED 910,000 BARRELS PER DAY IN MARCH, ACCORDING TO GOVERNMENT FIGURES.
THE CEO OF ITALIAN OIL PRODUCER ENI HELD TALKS WITH VENEZUELA'S INTERIM PRESIDENT DELCY RODRIGUEZ, THE COMPANY ANNOUNCES.

data.title: AMC Deploys Prisma Prop Tech Resident Portal Platform Across Portfolio of Managed Multifamily Communities
data.description: In Utah and Georgia, Apartment Management Consultants (AMC) and Prisma Prop Tech are partnering to implement Prisma's resident portal and payments platform in over 900 apartment communities managed by AMC. By utilizing Prisma's platform and mobile app, AMC aims to enhance resident and owner experience by promoting prompt digital rent payments, offering various payment methods, providing resident rewards, and fostering loyalty.

data.title: EWTN to Premiere One-Hour News Special 'Pope Leo's Peru'
data.description: Reporting live from Chiclayo, Peru, and surrounding areas delves into the rural upbringing that influenced Pope Leo. "Pope Leo's Peru," a new special from EWTN Global Catholic Network, will debut, providing a comprehensive examination of the Holy Father's roots. With a duration of one hour, this exclusive EWTN News program is set to showcase...

BRENT CRUDE FUTURES CLOSE AT $111.26 PER BARREL, RISING $3.03 OR 2.8%.
Brent crude futures settle at $111.26/bbl, up $3.03, 2.8%.

data.title: SOCCER 5 TO BRING NEW SOCCER EXPERIENCE TO SNOHOMISH COUNTY
data.description: The Blomberg family is launching an innovative and high-energy small-sided soccer concept in Snohomish County, Washington on May 1, 2026. Soccer 5® Snohomish County is set to introduce a unique soccer experience with a modern facility focused on creating inclusive opportunities for all. The facility will host small-sided games to enhance player engagement and skill development. The initiative aims to cater to a wide range of participants and promote an active lifestyle. The concept is expected to attract soccer enthusiasts of all ages and skill levels, offering an exciting and dynamic environment for the community.
DISNEY EXPRESSES CONFIDENCE THAT ITS TRACK RECORD AFFIRMS ITS ONGOING ELIGIBILITY TO HOLD US BROADCAST STATION LICENSES AND IS READY TO PROVE SO THROUGH "APPROPRIATE LEGAL CHANNELS."

data.title: Distributor Sees 25% Surge in Conversions After Website Redesign with Digital Silk
data.description: Miami-based Digital Silk, a top web design agency specializing in brand strategies, custom website design, and digital marketing, reveals the revamp and creation of an eCommerce site for USA Roller. The redesign aims to enhance the online shopping experience for USA Roller customers, improving brand visibility and driving sales. The agency's expertise in developing effective digital campaigns is expected to propel USA Roller's online growth.
